recent_calls.summary: Dan called Budget's after-hours assistant regarding an issue with his air conditioning unit not turning on. The agent informed him that the team would contact him on the next business day to confirm or reschedule his service appointment. Dan provided positive feedback about the interaction and chose to wait for the team to call him back.

Maria called to confirm the service appointment for her air conditioning and furnace issue, specifically water leaking from the furnace when the AC is turned on. The agent confirmed the details, noted her preference for an appointment before 11 AM on May 4th, and collected feedback. The call ended successfully with no further questions from Maria.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing themselves but no further conversation occurred before the user hung up.
The user requested to speak to Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully.

The user called to speak with Amy or Nicole but was informed Nicole was unavailable. The user left a message for Nicole to call Valerie Rappard, and the agent confirmed the message and contact details. The call ended politely after the message was taken.

The user, Margaret Austin, called to report that her hot water heater installed through a weatherization program is not heating up. The agent booked an appointment for a plumbing service on Monday, May 4th at 10 AM and informed the user that cost and warranty details would be reviewed during the follow-up. The user was satisfied with the quick service and gave positive feedback.

The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly before the user could provide any information or engage with the agent. The agent attempted to start the conversation by asking for the service address ZIP code but was cut off.
The user called to change an appointment and the agent asked for clarification about the type of service related to the appointment. The call ended shortly after without completing the request.

The user called to report a plumbing leak after a recent repair and requested an early morning service appointment on a weekday. The agent confirmed the details and offered available time slots, but the user requested to speak to a live service representative, and the call was transferred accordingly.
The user, Lauren, called back and the agent, Sophie, greeted her and asked for more details to assist her. The call was then transferred to another number for further assistance.

The user, Keith Weaver, returned a call from an unknown number and spoke briefly with Sophie from Budget. Sophie attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended after the transfer was successful.

The user called back returning a call from a technician and was transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, attempted to clarify the user's needs before transferring the call. The transfer was completed successfully.

The user called to confirm an existing appointment related to a home warranty service. The agent attempted to clarify the type of service but the user did not provide further details before ending the call. The call ended without resolution or confirmation of the appointment details.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer successfully.

The user called to schedule a cooling service for an air cooler under their American Home Shield home warranty, requesting same-day service. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that the dispatch number could be looked up in the portal. The user expressed dissatisfaction due to the inability to get same-day service and requested to be connected to a live agent, which was done successfully.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to inform that they completed the intake questionnaire and are ready to schedule a heating service due to smoke coming from the vents. The agent confirmed the details, corrected the service address, and scheduled the user for the next available appointment. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the assistant's availability.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself but no further conversation occurring before the user hung up.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user requested to speak with customer service, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call was successfully transferred without any issues.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after the agent's greeting without any further conversation.

The user called to confirm the installation date of a water heater replaced last year. The agent gathered the necessary details and arranged for a callback with the installation confirmation. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.
The user, Janice, returned a call from Nicole and was promptly transferred by the agent Sophie to a live agent for further assistance. The call was brief and ended with a successful transfer.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

Sean called to schedule an appointment for a Freon check in his air conditioner due to a suspected leak. The agent confirmed his role as the homeowner, offered available time slots, and successfully booked an appointment for Friday, May 8th at 8 AM. The call concluded with the agent informing Sean about the dispatch fee and requesting feedback, which Sean declined.

Horace and Tina called to schedule heating service related to their American Home Shield home warranty because their furnace did not turn on. The agent confirmed the service details, including the preferred time for a technician visit tomorrow morning, and the user declined information about maintenance programs. The call ended positively with the user providing high feedback on the interaction.

The user, Dr. Macklin, the building principal at Hazelwood Central High School, called to remind about the Algebra 1 ELC end of course exam scheduled for Tuesday. The call was very brief and ended abruptly as it reached voicemail.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for service information.

The user, Jacqueline from Novo Group, called to offer marketing services to the agent's company but clarified she did not need any HVAC or plumbing services. The agent explained their role in handling service requests and ended the call politely. No service was requested or provided during the call.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance without any detailed conversation. The call lasted 13 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user, Lynn from Grantham Group, called to confirm a scheduled appointment with American Home Shield. The agent was unable to find the appointment in the system and offered to transfer the user to a live representative, which the user accepted. The call was successfully transferred to a live agent for further assistance.
The user requested to be transferred to a live agent, and the agent successfully transferred the call to the appropriate number.

The user called to schedule routine summer maintenance for their air conditioner, which was installed last year. The agent provided available morning time slots, and the user selected Tuesday, May 5th at 8 AM. The appointment was provisionally booked, and the user declined to provide feedback.

Shelia called to reschedule a follow-up appointment for her air conditioner. The agent offered available slots, and Shelia chose Monday, May 4th at 2 PM. The appointment was successfully booked, and Shelia provided positive feedback about the ease of resolving her issue.

The user called customer service and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, handled the call professionally and completed the transfer successfully.

John called to inquire about a spring cleanup service that was supposed to be included with an AC service performed in September last year, but he never received follow-up. The agent apologized and transferred the call to someone who could provide more information. The call ended with a successful transfer to another representative.

The user called to request HVAC service for a cooling issue under their home warranty. The agent collected all necessary details, confirmed the information, and noted that this was a second opinion. The user agreed to receive information about maintenance programs and declined to provide feedback at the end of the call.

The agent, Sophie, contacted Carol to assist with a recent call Carol received, offering help with service, billing, or scheduling. Carol was momentarily unavailable and did not provide further information before hanging up. The call ended without resolution.
The user requested to speak with Nicole, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate person successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.

The user called to request that Amy resend the finance company link and to update the file with the user's daughter's Gmail address. The agent confirmed the email address and assured the user that the message would be passed along to Amy and the team. The call ended with the user expressing thanks and no further requests.
The user called Budget and requested to speak with a live representative instead of the virtual assistant. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user returned a call regarding a scheduled service appointment and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The agent attempted to engage the user by asking for their service address ZIP code, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after. No information was exchanged during the call.
The user requested to speak to Amy, and the agent transferred the call to the appropriate live agent successfully. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.

The user, Jeff and Melissa, returned a call from Nicole and was greeted by Sophie from Budget. Sophie attempted to connect them with a live agent and successfully transferred the call. No further conversation took place after the transfer.

Mary called to report an issue with her upstairs heating not turning on despite the thermostat working, suspecting a wiring problem after recent AC repair. She requested a service appointment, and the agent successfully booked a technician visit for Monday, May 11th at 2 PM. Mary also inquired about the maintenance program renewal, but no further action was taken on that.
The user called to return a call from Nicole and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was successful and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with Nicole, and the agent successfully transferred the call to the appropriate person. The call ended shortly after the transfer was completed.
